title: Tracing, Evals, and Failure Analysis · Goal Brief: Regression Analysis
summary: Evaluate a multi-turn tool agent across realistic environments. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops regression analysis increment in an agent trace and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare agent versions by material outcome slices and investigate regressions.
Classify planning, tool, state, recovery, authorization, and communication failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
